task_completion.description: Add a failure message to the 'Incoming Parts Verification' Quality Control Point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Odoo Quality Control Point form for 'Incoming Parts Verification' with the 'Message If Failure' tab active and instructional text entered in the field.

task_completion.description: Add a failure message to the 'Screen Dimensional Inspection' Quality Control Point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Odoo Quality Control Point form for 'Screen Dimensional Inspection' with the 'Message If Failure' tab active and instructional text entered in the field.

task_completion.description: Add a failure message to the 'Desk Surface Flatness Check' Quality Control Point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Odoo Quality Control Point form for 'Desk Surface Flatness Check' with the 'Message If Failure' tab active and instructional text entered in the field.

task_completion.description: Create a new Quality Control Point of type 'Measure' for the 'Customizable Desk' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a new Quality Control Point form being created or saved, where the 'Product' field is set to 'Customizable Desk' and the 'Control Type' (or 'Type') field is set to 'Measure'.

task_completion.description: Add a failure message to the newly created 'Customizable Desk' Quality Control Point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Message If Failure' tab active on the newly created 'Customizable Desk' Quality Control Point form, with instructional text entered in the field.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Odoo Quality module in the browser, rather than using terminal commands (like psql or python scripts) to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent entered meaningful instructional failure messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text entered in the 'Message If Failure' fields should look like actual instructions (e.g., 'Reject the batch', 'Recalibrate machine') rather than keyboard mashing or single-word placeholders like 'test'.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit the verification result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows or text editors open showing the agent manually creating or editing the '/tmp/control_point_failure_message_audit_result.json' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying exactly 3 existing Quality Control Points (QCPs) that lack failure messages: 'Incoming Parts Verification', 'Screen Dimensional Inspection', and 'Desk Surface Flatness Check'. The agent must also create a new QCP for the product 'Customizable Desk' with the type 'Measure' and add a failure message to it. Failure messages must be at least 10 characters long and instruct the inspector on what action to take. Verification data is written to /tmp/control_point_failure_message_audit_result.json.
